scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run start" "cd backend && npm run start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.typecheck: cd frontend && npm run typecheck && cd ../backend && npm run typecheck
scripts.ci:local: npm run install:all && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
